body_txt: In any series of ostensibly similar individuals, the last one will always be smaller than (or otherwise different from) the rest, and will often cause more trouble than the others. Just to drive the point home, they may have an Odd Name Out . When the Youngest Child Wins , the child is often The Runt at the End, and may also be The Fool . In less sensitive works, will also often be a Butt-Monkey . Be careful, because sometimes The Runt at the End turns out to be a Pint-Sized Powerhouse . Compare Arson, Murder, and Jaywalking and One Off Sync . The One Guy is a Sub-Trope about a very easy difference to use. Also see Odd Last Item Index .
